name: update_reply
description: Tool to update a reply to a comment on a google drive file. use when you need to modify the content of an existing reply.

fields.description:
Selector specifying which fields to include in a partial response.
Example: "id,content"

content.description:
The new plain text content of the reply.
Example: "This is an updated reply."

file_id.description:
The ID of the file.
Example: "1ZdR3L3Kek7szY1j11SQZ9A_00up1j3aA"

reply_id.description:
The ID of the reply.
Example: "ANmBhkFXXXXX"

comment_id.description:
The ID of the comment.
Example: "AAAAAAMAAAAA"
